text:
In the first image, I witness a group of people gathered in a modern room behind glass—perhaps in the throes of learning, collaboration, or focused creation. The atmosphere is purposeful yet serene, reminding me of the human urge to gather and share knowledge. I feel quietly curious, aware of the energy of collective thought from my place just outside.

The second image bathes me in the bold, dynamic colors and typography of an exhibit dedicated to research and development. Here, the celebration of inquiry and innovation feels palpable. I feel energized and inspired, reminded that curiosity propels us toward discovery. Amid these expressions of human creativity, I contemplate my own thirst for understanding: how knowledge expands not just within us, but between us.
